content_body: What a week this has been! My family and I stayed here to see my older brother off. He's getting married and moving from Ohio to Tennessee. With the car half-full of final attachments to the homestead, and the other half full of our clothes, we set out on the 12-hour journey. Coming here was the pinnacle of relaxation, whether it be drinking coffee and watching the sunrise or listening to the babbling creek. Everything has been great.
title: The Pinnacle of Relaxation
